question: In a team of 75 employees, the average monthly sales per employee is Rs 1.8 lakh. If 30 junior employees average Rs 1.2 lakh each, what is the average monthly sales figure (in Rs lakh) for the senior employees?
Three groups of students have average ages 18, 20, and 22 respectively. If the number of students in the three groups is in the ratio 2:3:5, what is the overall average age?
The average of 11 numbers is 68. If the average of the first five is 63 and the average of the last five is 72, find the 6th number.
What is the average of all integers between 300 and 450 that are exactly divisible by 13?
A batsman's average score for a certain number of innings is 44. If he scores 132 runs in the next innings, his average becomes 48. How many innings did he play earlier?

The average of 13 numbers is 70. The average of the first five numbers is 60. The average of the next five numbers is 25 % higher than the average of the first five numbers. The 11th number is 6 less than the 13th number, and the 12th number is 4 greater than the 13th number. What is the average of the 11th and 12th numbers?
The average salary of 24 employees is Rs40,000. The average salary of 8 senior staff is Rs60,000. What is the average salary for the other employees?
A cricketer's average in 10 innings is 58. If his highest score is excluded, the average drops to 54. What is his highest score?
Three numbers are such that when the average of any two of them is added to the third, the results obtained are 180, 168, and 150, respectively. What is the average of the original three numbers?
The average age of 40 students in a class is 16 years. When a new student is admitted, the average increases by 0.2 years. What is the age of the new student?
The monthly average salary for 8 employees plus one supervisor is Rs15,000. If the supervisor earns Rs25,000, what is the average salary of the 8 employees?

A company has 80 employees, of whom 35 % are women. The average monthly salary of the women is Rs72,000, while that of the men is Rs68,000. What is the overall average monthly salary (in Rs1000) of the whole workforce?
What is the average of all three-digit numbers divisible by 23?
The average weight of 12 people is 65 kg. If one person leaves and the new average becomes 64.5 kg, what is the weight of the person who left?
What is the average of all numbers between 1000 and 1300 that are divisible by 25?

There are 5 consecutive even numbers X₁, X₂, X₃, X₄, x₅ and 4 consecutive odd numbers Y₁, Y₂, Y₃, Y₄. The average of the even numbers is 5 more than the average of the odd numbers. If the sum of the even numbers is 30 more than the sum of the odd numbers, find the average of the odd numbers.

The overall average salary for all employees in an office is Rs16,000. Officers earn an average salary of Rs28,000, while non-officers make an average of Rs10,000. If there are 15 officers, determine the number of non-officers.
Three numbers are such that when the sum of any two of them is added to half of the third, the results are 210, 198, and 192 respectively. What is the average of the three numbers?
The average of 9 numbers is 56. When one number is removed, the average becomes 54. What number was removed?
The average age of a committee of 9 members increases by 3 years when two men aged 42 and 44 years are replaced by two women. What is the average age of these two women?

There are 6 consecutive integers and 5 consecutive integers. The average of the 6 integers is 2 less than the average of the 5 integers. The sum of the 5 integers is 4 more than the sum of the 6 integers. Find the average of the 6 integers.
The average age of 19 students is 17 years. A teacher joins the group, and the average becomes 18 years. What is the teacher's age?
In a team of 80 employees, the average salary is Rs62,000. If 30 of them earn an average salary of Rs72,000, what is the average salary of the remaining employees?
The average weight of 30 students is 60 kg. If one student is removed, the average drops to 59.5 kg. What is the weight of the removed student?

In a group of 40 boys, the average height was initially determined to be 160 cm. However, it was later discovered that the height of one boy was incorrectly recorded as 165 cm when it should have been 156 cm. Calculate the accurate average height.
The average of a group of 8 consecutive even numbers is 41. What is the sum of the smallest and largest numbers in the group?
The average of a group of 11 numbers is 61. If the first six numbers have an average of 57 and the last six numbers have an average of 65, what is the sixth number?
The average of x and y is 30. The average of x, y, and z is 40. What is the average of x, y, and 2z?
The average weight of 10 boxes is 15.5 kg. If the heaviest box weighs 21 kg and the lightest weighs 10 kg, what is the average weight of the remaining boxes?
The average salary of 40 workers in a factory is Rs. 24,000. If the salary of a supervisor is added, the average rises to Rs. 24,500. What is the supervisor's salary?
The average marks of 30 students in a class is 62. If the marks of one student were wrongly entered as 82 instead of 62, what is the CORRECT average?
The average of a certain number of quantities is 45. If 5 is added to each quantity, what will be the new average?
A group of 5 friends went to a restaurant. If 4 of them paid Rs. 200 each and the fifth paid Rs. x, the average bill per person came out to be Rs. 210. What is the value of x?
A group of 6 students went on a trip and spent Rs. 1200 in total. If one of them spent Rs. 300 while the rest spent equally, what was the average spending of the other 5 students?
A student took 7 tests and had an average of 72. If his average after 8 tests increased to 73, what was his score on the 8th test?
The average of 5 different numbers is 24. If the smallest number is 15, what is the average of the remaining four numbers?
The average score of 25 students in a test is 68. The top 5 scorers had an average of 80, and the lowest 5 had an average of 50. What is the average of the remaining 15 students?
In a company, the average salary of 5 engineers is Rs. 60,000. If one engineer leaves and the average salary becomes Rs. 58,000, what was the salary of the engineer who left?
The average of 9 numbers is 63. When one number is removed, the average becomes 60. What number was removed?
A cricketer has played 8 innings with an average score of 40. In the next inning, he scores 80. What will be the new average?
In a company, the average salary of 5 junior employees is Rs. 30,000, and that of 4 senior employees is Rs. 60,000. What is the combined average salary?
The average of 12 results is 75. If the top two results are excluded, the average becomes 72. What is the average of the top two results?
The average of three numbers is 35. The first number is 20% more than the second, and the third is 20% less than the second. What is the second number?
If the average of ten numbers is 50 and the average of the first six numbers is 45, what is the average of the last four numbers?
An investor tracks 5 stocks. Four of them have an average return of 8%. If the overall average return is 9%, what was the return on the fifth stock?
The average score of a batsman in 20 innings is 42. If his highest score of 120 is excluded, what is the new average?
The average of 8 numbers is 56. If two of them are removed and the new average becomes 54, what is the average of the two removed numbers?
A class of 60 students has an average score of 75. If 5 new students are added and the class average increases by 1, what is the average score of the 5 new students?
The average age of 10 students in a class increases by 1 year when a 30-year-old teacher joins them. What was the original average age of the students?
The average temperature of a city from Monday to Friday is 40° C. If the temperature on Saturday is 45° C, what will be the average temperature from Monday to Saturday?

The weekly expenditure (in dollars) of 5 families on groceries is: Family A = 250, Family B = 400, Family C = 350, Family D = 500, Family E = 300. Determine: (i) Average expenditure, (ii) Family spending above average, (iii) Difference between highest and lowest expenditure.
options: Average = $350, Families above average = B, D, Difference = $250
Average = $360, Families above average = C, D, Difference = $250
Average = $360, Families above average = B, D, Difference = $200
Average = $360, Families above average = B, D, Difference = $250

question: The average of 50 numbers was calculated as 38. Later it was found that two numbers were wrongly taken as 33 and 27 instead of 23 and 17. What is the correct average? [SSC CHSL 2025 Tier 1, 12 Nov Shift 3]
If the average of 14 consecutive even numbers is 107, find the smallest number. [SSC CHSL 2025 Tier 1, 13 Nov Shift 1]

The average of 8 numbers is 45. If each of the first 4 numbers is increased by 5 and each of the last 4 numbers is decreased by 3, what will be the new average? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 13 Nov 2025, Shift-2]
The average age of 20 students is 18 years. A group of 5 new students joins, increasing the average to 20 years. Find the average age of the 5 new students.

The average of 8 numbers is 45. If each of the first 4 numbers is increased by 5 and each of the last 4 numbers is decreased by 3, what will be the new average? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 13 Nov 2025, Shift-2]
In a group of 7 students, 4 boys and 3 girls spent an average of Rs120 each. If the average spending of the boys was Rs150, what was the average spending of the girls?
The average of 11 numbers is 50. If the first six numbers have an average of 49 and the last six numbers have an average of 52, find the middle number.

A teacher calculated the average marks of 15 students in a test as 72.4. Later, she found that the marks of one student were wrongly entered as 68.9 instead of 86.3. After correcting the error, what is the correct average mark of the class? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 15 Nov 2025, Shift-1]
The average weight of 30 students is 60 kg. When the teacher's weight is included, the average becomes 61 kg. What is the weight of the teacher? [SSC CHSL Tier 1, 15 Nov 2025, Shift-2]

A school had 120 students with an average age of 20 years. Later, a new batch of students joined. After their inclusion, the average age dropped to 19.5 years, even though the newcomers had an average age of 18 years. Find the number of students in the new batch.

A company had 4 departments with an average of 45 employees each. Later, a fifth department was added with 90 employees. Due to restructuring, 10 employees from each of the original four departments were transferred to the new department. What is the new average number of employees per department?

The average marks of 15 students in a science laboratory practical were 64. Later, it was found that the mark of one student was wrongly taken as 58 instead of 85. After correcting the mistake, the average increases. Now, a new student joins whose marks are 10% more than the new average. What is the final average of the group?

The average age of 15 players in a hockey team is the same as it was 4 years ago because 5 players, whose current average age is 28 years, were replaced by 5 new players. What is the average age of the newcomers?
The average of 15 numbers is 28. If each number is doubled and then 5 is added to each, what will be the new average?

In a warehouse, there are 3 stacks of bricks. The average weight of the bricks in Stack A is 112.5 kg, in Stack B is 118.75 kg, and in Stack C is 107.25 kg. If Stack A has 12 bricks, Stack B has 8 bricks, and Stack C has 16 bricks, find the overall average weight of all bricks in the warehouse.
The average of 5 consecutive even numbers is 46. If the next 3 consecutive even numbers are added, what is the new average?
The average of 9 numbers is 63. If the average of the first 4 numbers is 60 and the average of the last 4 numbers is 66, what is the fifth number?
A batsman typically scores 40 runs in 20 innings. To raise his average by two, how many runs does he need to score in the twenty-first inning?
The average of 20 numbers is 45. If each number is decreased by 7, what will be the new average?
The average salary of employees in a company is Rs20,000. If a new employee with a salary of Rs50,000 joins, the average increases by Rs500. Find the number of employees originally in the company.
The average of 3, 5, 7 is increased by 2, what is the new average?
The average score of 36 students is 40. When a group of 12 new students joins, the average rises to 44. Find the average score of the new students.

The average monthly salary of employees in a company is Rs40,000. When 4 new employees with average salary Rs25,000 join, the average salary of the whole company decreases by Rs3,000. Find the original number of employees.

'P', 'Q', 'R' and 'S' have different amounts. 'Q' has 2.5 times the amount 'P' has. 'S' has 40% less than 'Q'. The amount 'R' has equals the average of all four persons. If the sum of amounts 'P' and 'R' is Rs. 4800, find the amount 'R' has.

The average age of 24 students is 15 years. If the teacher's age is included, the average rises by 1 year. Later, another teacher joins, and the average rises by 1 more year. What is the age of the second teacher?

In a hostel, the average age of 30 students was 18 years. Later, 5 students left and 5 new students joined. The average age of the new group became 17.2 years. If the average age of the 5 students who left was 20.4 years, find the average age of the 5 students who joined.

A quality control officer tracks the defect rates in 4 different machines in a textile factory. The first machine produces fabrics with an average defect rate of 1.8%, the second with 2.4%, and the third with 1.6%. The fourth machine operated for 5 fewer hours than the average runtime of the first three, yet its total defective output was 0.92 units. If the total number of defective units from all four machines is 4.12, and each machine's total production was identical, find the defect percentage of the fourth machine.

In a digital learning centre, there are three types of online tests. The average score of a student in the first and second test is 82.6. The average score in the second and third test is 84.2. The average of the first and third test is 80.4. If the student scored 2.5 marks less in the third test than in the first, find the marks obtained in the second test.
The average of 8 numbers is 26. If one number is excluded, the average becomes 25. Find the excluded number.
If the average of 4, 6, x, and 10 is 8, find the value of x.
The average of four numbers is 44. The average of the first and second is 40, and that of the third and fourth is 48. What is the second number if the first is 36?
Average of 5 consecutive even numbers is 24. Find the largest number.
The average score of 4 innings is 50 runs. If the difference between the highest and lowest score is 30 and the remaining two scores are 48 and 52, find the highest score.
Average of first 10 odd numbers is:
Find the average of 10, 20, 30, 40, and 50.

The average marks of 12 students in a mathematics test are 63.5. Later, it was found that one student's score was misread as 56 instead of 65. After correcting this error, another student's marks were removed for being invalid, and the average of the remaining 11 students rose to 64.2. Find the marks of the student whose score was removed.

In a class of a certain number of students, if a student weighing 30 kg joins, the average weight increases by 1 kg. If another student weighing 30 kg joins, the average increases by 1.5 kg over the original average. What was the original average weight of the class?

The average of 9 numbers is 72. The difference between the highest and lowest number is 54. If the highest number is excluded, the average of the remaining 8 numbers drops by 3. What is the lowest number?
If average of x, x+2, x+4 is 10, find x.
A student's average marks in 4 subjects is 75. What should be his score in the fifth subject to get an overall average of 78?
The average of 6 numbers is 18. If two numbers 14 and 22 are removed, what is the new average of the remaining numbers?
The average of 8 consecutive odd numbers starting from 11 is:

At a cultural club, 4 events were organized. The average attendance for the first two events was 152.5 people. The next two events had an average of 198.5 people. Later, due to a correction, it was found that the attendance at one of the first two events was 12 more than what was originally recorded, and one of the last two events was 9 less. Find the corrected overall average attendance for all 4 events.

In a college, there are 600 faculty members, out of which 40% are females. The average height of males is 170 cm, and the average height of females is 160 cm. What is the average height of the entire faculty?
There are 15 numbers. The average of all 15 is 20. The average of the first 9 numbers is 18. The average of the last 7 numbers is 24. What is the 9th number?
A machine produces 120, 150, 130, and 100 units on four consecutive days. How many units should it produce on the 5th day to bring the average output to 130 units?
Five hundred real numbers have an average of zero. How many of them can be negative, at most?
A librarian checks 5 novels with pages: 240, 300, 280, 260, and 320. Later he finds that the 260-page count was wrongly written; the correct count is 360. What is the correct average number of pages?

In a warehouse, 7 crates of goods have an average weight of 84.5 kg. One of the crates, weighing 79.2 kg, is replaced by a new crate. As a result, the average weight becomes 87.1 kg. Later, 3 more crates are added, each weighing 91.3 kg. What is the weight of the new crate that replaced the old one?

Ravi's calorie intake for 6 days was 2100, 2200, 2000, 2300, 2400, and 2100. On the 7th day, he forgot to record his food. If the weekly average intake is 2200, how many calories did he consume on the 7th day?

A factory hired 9 workers and found that their average productivity per day was 42.75 units. Later, 3 more workers were hired. The average productivity of all 12 workers then became 45.5 units. However, one of the new 3 workers made 52.2 units daily, and another made 48.4 units daily. What is the daily productivity of the third new worker?
The average of 20 numbers is 45. If 50% of the numbers are increased by 4 each and the remaining 50% are decreased by 6 each, what is the new average of the numbers?

In a class of 50 students, the marks of 49 students are given, and their average marks are 70. The teacher then added the marks of the 50th student, and the new average became 71. What were the marks of the 50th student?
The average of five numbers is 48. When one number is removed, the average of the remaining four numbers becomes 45. What is the value of the number that was excluded?
A batsman scored 45, 60, 55, and 40 runs in four matches. In the 5th match, he wants his average to reach exactly 55 runs. How many runs must he score in the 5th match?

The average marks of 25 students is 48. Later, 5 new students join the group, each scoring 60 marks. After that, the teacher finds that one of the original students' marks was wrongly entered as 40 instead of 70. Find the final average marks of the class.
The average marks of 40 students in a class is 72. Later, it was discovered that a student’s marks were recorded as 93 instead of 39. What is the correct average?
The average of 7 numbers is 81. If the average of the first 3 is 87 and last 3 is 78, what is the 4th number?
The average of 5 consecutive odd natural numbers is 37. Previous 5 consecutive odd natural numbers to these 5 odd natural numbers are also included. What will be the average of newly added numbers?
There are 4 numbers N1, N2, N3 and N4. Average of N1, N2 and N3 is 30. Average of N2, N3 and N4 is 26. value of N1 is 28. What is the value of N4?
The average of 5 consecutive odd natural numbers is 27. Previous 5 consecutive odd natural numbers to these 5 odd natural numbers are also included. What will be the average of newly added numbers?
Average age of group A of 20 students is 40 years. Average age of group B of 40 students is 'x' years. Combined average age of group A and group B is 50 years. What is the value of 'x'?
The average of 5 consecutive odd natural numbers is 47. Previous 5 consecutive odd natural numbers to these 5 odd natural numbers are also included. What will be the average of newly added numbers?
There are 14 players in a team. Average age of these 14 players is 'X'. 5 new players joined the team. There is no change in the average age of the team. What is the total age of these 5 players?
Average age of group A of 10 students is 20 years. Average age of group B of 20 students is ‘x’ years. Combined average age of group A and group B is 34 years. What is the value of ‘x’?
Average of consecutive even natural numbers from 2 to 'N' is 36. What is the value of 'N'? (where N is an even natural number)

In a mathematics club, the average score of 15 students in a weekly quiz is 72.4. After including the scores of 5 more students, the overall average becomes 74.6. If the scores of three of the new students are 76.2, 78.5, and 80.4, respectively, and the remaining two have equal scores, find the score of each of the remaining two students.

In a community library, there are three sections: Fiction, Non-Fiction, and Children’s books. The average number of books in the Fiction and Non-Fiction sections is 1,275. The average number of books in the Non-Fiction and Children’s sections is 1,450. If the total number of books in all three sections is 3,900, find the number of books in the Non- Fiction section.

Which of the following statements is/are CORRECT? I. The average of 6 numbers is 42. If one number is removed, the average of the remaining 5 numbers becomes 40, so the removed number is 52. II. If instead, the removed number was 38, the average of the remaining 5 numbers would be 43.

A group of 12 students appeared for a physics test. The average of the top 6 scores was 84.5, and the average of the bottom 6 scores was 72.75. Later, it was found that a decimal error had occurred, and one of the scores from the bottom half was mistakenly recorded as 58.2 instead of 85.2. What is the corrected overall average of the group?
The average marks of 30 students is 55. If one student who scored 40 is replaced by another who scored 70, what will be the new average? [SSC CHSL 2025 Tier 1, 12 Nov Shift 2]
The average of 12 numbers is 46. When two numbers, 72 and 84, are removed and three new numbers are added, the new average becomes 48. What is the average of the three numbers added?
The average of 15 numbers is 38. If the average of the first 7 numbers is 41 and that of the last 7 numbers is 35, what is the middle number?

A futuristic satellite network has two clusters. Cluster A has 20 satellites with average signal strength 80 units. Cluster B has 30 satellites with average signal strength 100 units. Due to calibration, signals of cluster A increase by 10% and cluster B decrease by 5%. Find the new combined mean signal strength.
The average of 20 numbers is 40. If the sum of the first 10 numbers is 380, what is the average of the remaining 10 numbers?
The average of 6 positive numbers is 10. If one number is excluded, the average becomes 9. What is the excluded number?
A student scores an average of 70 marks in the first 4 tests. What must he score in the 5th test to have an overall average of 75?
A shopkeeper sells 5 types of fruits. The average cost of each fruit is Rs40. What is the total cost of all fruits?
The average of 3.25, 2 1/2 and 4.75 is:
A student scored marks in 5 subjects: 72, 68, 74, 70, and one unknown subject. If his average is 71, what is the missing mark?
The average of 5 numbers is 20. What is the sum of these numbers?
The average age of a class of 30 students is 15 years. If the teacher's age is included, the average becomes 16 years. Find the teacher's age in years.
The average weight of 5 boys is 60 kg. If one boy weighing 75 kg leaves, what is the new average weight?
The average weight of 7 boxes is 12 kg. What is the total weight?
The average of 4 exam scores is 10. If three of the scores are 6, 9, and 11, what is the fourth score?
A batsman scores 34, 36, 38, 40, 42 in his 5 innings respectively. Find the average runs in his 5 innings?
The average of four consecutive even numbers is 27. What is the largest of these four numbers?
The average weight of 8 men in a group is 70 kg. What is the total weight of all the men combined?
The average of five consecutive odd numbers is 35. What is the smallest of these numbers?
The mean age of 15 people is 32. If 3 people with an average age of 30 are replaced by 3 new people, and the new average becomes 33, what is the average age of the new group of 3 people?
A car travels 40 km at 20 km/h and 40 km at 40 km/h. Find its average speed.
The average of 7 numbers is 21. If one of the numbers is increased by 14, by how much does the average increase?
A student has an average of 60 marks across 5 subjects. What are the total marks obtained by the student in all subjects?
A cricket player has an average of 55 runs over 9 matches. If he scores 145 runs in the 10th match, what will be his new average?
The daily wages of three workers are 100, 120, and 140. What is the average daily wage?
The average salary of 5 employees in a company is Rs8,000. What is the total salary paid to all 5 employees?
The average marks of 10 students are 45. If the class teacher's marks are included, the new average becomes 47. What are the teacher's marks?
A batsman has an average score of 32 runs over 9 innings. In his 10th innings, he scored 52 runs. What is his new average after 10 innings?
A man first walks 10 km in 2 hours and then runs 5 km in 30 minutes. What is his average speed?
A baker baked three batches of cupcakes containing 50, 60, and 70 cupcakes each. What is the average number of cupcakes per batch?
A batsman has an average of 48 runs over 25 innings. How many runs must he score in his 26th inning to raise his average to 50?
In a class of 25 students, the average marks are 40. The teacher then decides to include her own score of 70 in the calculation. What will be the new average marks for the class?
The average salary of 40 employees is Rs20,000. If the manager joins and the new average rises by Rs500, what is the manager's salary?
The average age of 10 students is 15. If one more student joins at age 20, what will be the new average?
A car travels 120 km in 2 hours and returns the same distance in 3 hours. Find the average speed for the round trip.
The weights of four parcels are 1.5 kg, 2.0 kg, 1.8 kg, and 2.7 kg. Find the average weight of the parcels.
The average of 5 test scores is 25. If a sixth score is added and the new average becomes 27, what is the value of the sixth score?
The average of 7 consecutive odd numbers is 63. What is the smallest of these 7 numbers?
The average of three numbers is 25 If two of the numbers are 20 and 30, what is the the third number?
The average age of 5 friends is 24 years. If the ages of four of them are 21, 25, 26, and 22 years, what is the age of the fifth friend?
The average of two positive numbers is 8. If the numbers are in the ratio 1:3, what is the product of the two numbers?
Five students scored the following marks in a test out of 50: 45, 32, 48, 25, and 40. What is the average score of the students?
The average length of three pieces of rope is 12 meters. If the lengths are in the ratio 2:3:4, what is the length of the longest piece?
Two students scored 10 and 20 marks in a quiz, giving an average of 15. If a third student scores 30, what will be the new average score of all three students?
A person's average daily expense over  days is . If the total expense for the first  days is , what was the expense on the day?
A cricketer scores an average of 45 runs per match over 12 matches. What is the total number of runs scored by the player ?
The average of 6 test scores is 8 . If a seventh score is added and the new average becomes 9 , what is the value of the new score added?
The average salary of 30 clerks is Rs12,000, and the average salary of 10 officers is Rs20,000. What is the combined average salary of all 40 employees?
A cyclist rides 30 km to a town at 12 km/h and returns at 15 km/h. Find the average speed for the round trip.
The average height of 30 trees in a garden is 15 feet. If the average height of 18 trees is 16 feet, what is the average height of the remaining 12 trees?
A player has an average score of 50 runs over 4 matches. If he scores 70 runs in the 5th match, what will be his new average?
A person travels 60 km by bus at 30 km/h, 40 km by car at 20 km/h, and 100 km by train at 50 km/h. Calculate the average speed for the total journey.
A cyclist covers half of the distance at 20 km/h and the other half at 10 km/h. What is his average speed?
The average of 5 consecutive odd numbers is 35. What is the largest number?
The average of points scored in three basketball matches is where and are points scored in first and second matches. Find the points scored in third match?
Calculate the average of the sequence of 21 odd integers where the first term is 13.
A bike rider travels 30 kilometers at a velocity of 5 km/h and then comes back along the same path at 6 km/h. What is the average speed for the entire trip?
The average weight of 6 students is 64 kg. If a new student joins and the average becomes 65 kg, what is the weight of the new student?
If the average of ages of 6 members is 20, and age of one member is 40, what is the average of the ages of other 5?
The average of 10 numbers is 16. If the average of first 4 is 14 and last 4 is 18, what is the average of the middle two?
A man earns Rs8000 in Jan, Rs9000 in Feb, Rs10000 in Mar. What's the average monthly income?
The average monthly income of a person for 6 months is Rs. 17000. During the next 3 months, he earned Rs. 19000 per month. What is the average income for all 9 months?
A man walks km at  km/h and then runs km at km/h. What is his average speed?
The average expenditure of R for 5 days is Rs. 120. His expenditure for the first 4 days is Rs. 50, Rs. 105, Rs. 95 and Rs. 160 respectively. What is his expenditure (in Rs.) on the 5th day?
A new student having weight 40 kg join a class of 39 students. The average weight of the class reduces by 0.5 kg. What is the new average weight (in kg) of the class?
Average of some numbers is 'p'. 22 is the smallest number among these numbers. Which of the following statement will be always correct? I. . II. 50 will be the largest number among these numbers.
There are two numbers such that the first number is half of the second number. If their average is 66, then what is the first number?
Average of 14 numbers is 'm'. Average of 5 numbers among them is 23. Average of the remaining numbers is 37. What is the value of 'm'?
Sum of the ages of two persons E and F is 50 years. The average age of E, F and G is 40 years. What is the age (in years) of G?
Sum of the ages of two persons E and F is 96 years. The average age of E, F and G is 50 years. What is the age (in years) of G?
Average of 8 numbers is 57. Average of first 4 numbers is double of the average of last 4 numbers. What is the sum of the last 4 numbers?
The average of 17 consecutive natural numbers is A. What is the sum of the largest and the smallest numbers?
l, m n 17 l n ? तथा के औसतों के मध्य अंतर है। तथा के मध्य अंतर क्या होगा En: Difference between the averages of l, m and m, n is 17. What will be the difference between l and n?
The average of 24 numbers is 34. A number 'M' is subtracted from each number. New average of these 24 numbers is 29. What is the value of 'M'?
Average of 8 numbers is P. One number is removed. New average is P + 2. Which number was removed?
23 consecutive natural numbers are given. These numbers are in ascending order. The average of last 11 numbers is 34. What is the average of all 23 numbers?
The average weight of A, B and C is 30 kg. The average weight of A and B is 34 kg. The average weight of B and C is 28 kg. What is the weight (in kg) of B?
